name: RABBIT-SPEC-BUG-6
title: Invariant 3 (impl-suggestion conforms to schema_version 1.0.0) has no test
description: spec.md Invariant 3 states the impl-suggestion file is written conforming to schema_version 1.0.0 on every invocation. No test in test/ verifies this. A structural test could assert SKILL.md body contains the full required schema field list (schema_version, feature, generated_at, request_summary, spec_changes, implementation_approach, affected_files, key_invariants) to prevent field drift.

history.note: Fixed in Wave 3: feature.json version synced to spec.md (1.2.0); tests added for Inv 3 (schema documented) and Inv 5 (Step 4 before Step 5).
